Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Vicky B. Lim, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Dorothy C. Concepcion, appears in Pro Per for Travelconcepts. Romeo Baful appears with Ms. Lim to informally translate Tagalag into English. Parties, and Mr. Balful, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
